comment.text: This is a button label that appears in a context menu for an AI agent, allowing the user to remove it.

usage.context:
id: "option_delete",
 key: "delete",
 label: isRootThirdPartyFolder
 ? t("Common:Disconnect")
 : isAIAgent
 ? t("DeleteAgent")
 : item.isTemplate
 ? t("Files:DeleteTemplateAction")
 : item.isRoom
 ? t("Common:DeleteRoom")
 : t("Common:Delete"),
